name: raycast-songsnap
title: SongSnap - Shazam for Raycast
description: Music recognition extension for Raycast. Identify songs instantly without leaving your workflow.
author: SongSnap Team

commands.name: identify-song
commands.title: Identify Song
commands.description: Record audio and identify the currently playing song

preferences.name: service
preferences.title: Recognition Service
preferences.description: Which service to use for song recognition

preferences.name: recordingDuration
preferences.title: Recording Duration
preferences.description: How many seconds to record audio

preferences.name: acoustIdApiKey
preferences.title: AcoustID API Key
preferences.description: Optional: Use your own key from acoustid.org/new-application

preferences.name: auddApiKey
preferences.title: AudD API Key
preferences.description: API key from audd.io (only needed if using AudD service)

preferences.name: acrcloudAccessKey
preferences.title: ACRCloud Access Key
preferences.description: Access key from acrcloud.com (only needed if using ACRCloud)

preferences.name: acrcloudAccessSecret
preferences.title: ACRCloud Access Secret
preferences.description: Access secret from acrcloud.com (only needed if using ACRCloud)

preferences.name: acrcloudHost
preferences.title: ACRCloud Host
preferences.description: ACRCloud host endpoint (only needed if using ACRCloud)
